title: More Glass Varients
description: Adds more glass variants to Minecraft, like hardened and charred glass
body:
New glass varients are here! 

- Hardened Glass
- More Hardened Glass
- Really Hardened Glass
- Charred Hardened Glass

![All the glass variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44899eef8424fd46ddc0a41e9c8ecae6cf14cdfe.png)

Each variant of glass can be obtained by smelting the previos one in a furnace. The order is Regular Glass -> Hardened Glass -> More Hardened Glass -> Really Hardened Glass -> Charred Hardened Glass. 

All glass variants can be found in the Colored Blocks catagory in the creative menu.
